headlines.headline: Jovik Asset Group misses quarterly revenue estimates by 15%

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch in a key segment directly postpones expected revenue and signals potential execution challenges.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
